preconditions: a : Filter.Tendsto (fun k => ↑(N k)) Filter.atTop Filter.atTop
a : ∀ (k x : ℕ), x ∈ A k → x ≤ N k
a : Filter.Tendsto (fun k => ↑(A k).card / √↑(N k)) Filter.atTop (nhds 1)
hbound : ∀ {n : ℕ}, 1 ≤ n → Erdos164.IsPRough p n → Erdos164.roughKernelSeries p n ≤ 1 / Real.log ↑(p * n)
hA_sub : A ⊆ {m | p ∣ m ∧ Erdos164.IsPRough p (m / p)}
h_blue : ∀ (P Q : Erdos214.Point), dist P Q = 1 → ¬(c P = Erdos214.Color.Blue ∧ c Q = Erdos214.Color.Blue)
h_error_dom : ∀ (k : ℕ), ∑' (l : ℕ), e (k + l) < a k
h_tail_dom : ∀ (k : ℕ), 4 * a k < ∑' (l : ℕ), a (k + 1 + l)
H : ∃ k, ∀ x ∈ Set.Ico k (k + 2 ^ r), ∃ i, x ≡ a i [ZMOD ↑(n i)]
prop_pos : ∀ α ∈ S, ∀ (i : Fin (m ^ d)), ∀ x ∈ getA α i, 0 < x
prop1 : ∀ α ∈ S, ∀ (i : Fin (m ^ d)), getβ α i ∈ S
prop2 : ∀ α ∈ S, ∀ (i : Fin (m ^ d)), Erdos283b.sumPow (getA α i) d % ↑m ^ d = ↑↑i
prop3 : ∀ α ∈ S, ∀ (i : Fin (m ^ d)), (getA α i).card = s
prop4 : ∀ α ∈ S, ∀ (i : Fin (m ^ d)), α = Erdos283b.sumRecip (getA α i) + getβ α i / ↑m
prop5 : ∀ α ∈ S, ∀ (i : Fin (m ^ d)) (B : Finset ℕ), Q B → Disjoint (getA α i) (Erdos283b.mFinset m B)
prop6 : ∀ α ∈ S, ∀ (i : Fin (m ^ d)) (B : Finset ℕ), Q B → Q (getA α i ∪ Erdos283b.mFinset m B)
hL : ∀ α ∈ S, ∀ (i : Fin (m ^ d)), L ≤ Erdos283b.sumPow (getA α i) d
hM : ∀ α ∈ S, ∀ (i : Fin (m ^ d)), Erdos283b.sumPow (getA α i) d ≤ M
ineq1a : 0 ≤ b * ↑r * (↑m ^ d - 1) - b * ↑s + a * (M - L)

base : ∀ α ∈ S,   ∀ (n : ℤ),     X - T ≤ n →       n ≤ ↑m ^ d * X + a * M + T →         a ∣ n - b * ↑r →           ∃ A, Q A ∧ (∀ x ∈ A, 0 < x) ∧ A.card = r ∧ Erdos283b.sumF a b d A = n ∧ Erdos283b.sumRecip A = α
h_neq : ∃ i, a i ≠ Erdos315.sylvester i
h_not_prime_pow : ∀ (p k : ℕ), Nat.Prime p → n ≠ p ^ k
a : ∀ (A B : Set α), A ∈ F → B ∈ F → A ⊂ B → (B \ A ∩ T).Nonempty ∧ (B \ A ∩ Tᶜ).Nonempty
a : ∃ r, ∀ (S : Finset (Fin p)), S ≠ ∅ → ∑ i ∈ S, a i = 0 → S.card = r
hhj : j - i + h ≤ n - i
h_r : Filter.Tendsto (fun x => ↑(Erdos785.missing_sum_count A B x) / x) Filter.atTop (nhds 0)
hA_prod : ∀ a ∈ A, ∀ b ∈ A, ¬Squarefree (a * b)
h_interior : P ∈ interior ((convexHull ℝ) {A, B, C})
hf : ∀ (h : ℝ), Continuous fun x => f (x + h) - f x
h_liminf : 1 < Filter.liminf (fun n => ↑(a n) ^ (1 / 2 ^ n)) Filter.atTop

named_assumptions: h_adj1 : Erdos1080.is_adjacent F q (Erdos1080.zero_Point hq) l1
h_adj2 : Erdos1080.is_adjacent F q p1 l1
h_adj3 : Erdos1080.is_adjacent F q p1 l2
preconditions: h_add : ∀ (a b : F), (a + b) ^ q = a ^ q + b ^ q
h_mul : ∀ (a b : F), (a * b) ^ q = a ^ q * b ^ q
h_sub : ∀ (a b : F), (a - b) ^ q = a ^ q - b ^ q
hf : ∀ (x h : ℝ), h > 0 → 2 * f x ≤ f (x + h) + f (x + 2 * h)
h : ∀ᵐ (p : ℝ × ℝ) ∂MeasureTheory.volume.prod MeasureTheory.volume, f (p.1 + p.2) = f p.1 + f p.2
